notes: Copy to google-account.json and set expectedEmail to the Google account used for clasp / Apps Script on this machine.
checkups: 1. clasp is logged in on this PC
2. Active clasp email matches expectedEmail and clasp can reach the bound Apps Script project (list-versions)

3. No PC-only Node scripts (milestone, check-google-account, git-push-backup, etc.) are on the live Apps Script project — they cause white screen (require is not defined). Verified by node check-google-account.js
